name: Southern Pecan Dainties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the light brown sugar, chopped pecans, beaten egg whites, salt, and vanilla extract until well combined.
2. Using a spoon or cookie scoop, drop scant tablespoonfuls of the mixture onto greased cookie sheets.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 300°F for about 20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
4. Turn off the heat and remove the cookies from the oven once they have baked to your desired level of doneness.
